sessionStart.bash:
echo '🎵 SampleMind AI — Copilot Agent Session'
echo ''
echo "📁 $(pwd)"
if [ -f .venv/bin/python ]; then echo "🐍 Python: $(.venv/bin/python --version 2>/dev/null)"; fi
if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then echo "📦 Node: $(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'not installed')"; fi
echo '📋 Commands: pytest tests/unit/ -v | ruff check src/ | mypy src/'

preToolUse.bash:
if echo "$COPILOT_TOOL_ARGS" | grep -q 'git commit'; then
  echo '🔍 Pre-commit: checking Python...'
  command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check src/ --fix 2>/dev/null || true
  command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format src/ 2>/dev/null || true
  echo '✅ Pre-commit checks done'
fi
